title: colubrina granulosa
intro: Colubrina granulosa, also known as the sandpaper tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rhamnaceae. The medicinal properties of Colubrina granulosa include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which make it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. Colubrina granulosa can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional medicine as a poultice to treat skin irritations and wounds.
